question: Who was born first, British novelist Doris Lessing or American writer Philip K. Dick? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Doris May Lessing, CH ("née" Tayler; 22 October 1919  – 17 November 2013) was a British novelist, poet, playwright, librettist, biographer and short story writer.
